author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Destination Starbase Brochure (Miner Ships)

Destination Starbase brings 3 new and unique ship models that equip players with the immediate dual function of being able to participate in Faction Fleet to earn ATLAS or generate resources in Faction Claims. In the future, Miner ships will continue to play a vital role in the galactic economy.   

The first 30% of the total ship quantity will have a 50% discount on the origination price, so get them discounted while you can!

The 3 ship models are:
 Armstrong IMP Tip - Small Miner
 Armstrong IMP Tap - Medium Miner
 Armstrong IMP  - Capital Miner

For more on pricing, ship details, and the Armstrong manufacturer, head to the link below! 

 | https://staratlas.com/destination-starbase/brochure
